prompt: Generate an image showing a bird perched on a branch with computer vision object detection overlays. Include a bounding box, class label, and heatmap highlighting the AI's focus area, mimicking the visual style from the reference image.
prompt_refined: Generate an image of a bird perched on a branch, featuring computer vision object detection overlays. These overlays should include a thin yellow bounding box tightly encompassing the bird, a white class label "bird: XX.X" displayed at the top-left corner of the bounding box, and a heatmap with a vibrant gradient from red (most intense) to blue (least intense) highlighting a specific region of the bird's body. The entire image, including the overlays, should precisely mimic the visual style, color palette, and rendering quality observed in image 1.
objects: Thin yellow bounding box around the bird
White class label "bird: XX.X" at the top-left corner of the bounding box
Heatmap with a vibrant gradient from red to blue highlighting a region of the bird's body
